ops.text: getaway pack fate DECIDED (audit lane): KEEP — fold into the plugin at repo-root/capt-hook/{pack.toml,hooks/} (plugin root = repo root; no plugin/ subdir). Pack is active (8 commits 2026-07-10..07-18), both hooks (onboard nudge, reflect stop-gate) reference live tested CLI surface + real skill IDs, full inline test coverage. The wiring gap was an integration gap, not dead code — AGENTS.md:23 already asserts plugin-shipped intent. Phase 2 riders for the getaway lane: drop the redundant marketplaces=["yasyf/cc-present"] line (field dies in the new descriptor anyway; already declared in plugin.json+marketplace.json), fix stale hooks.json mention at AGENTS.md:18, delete root capt-hook.toml. getaway python auto-activation trigger confirmed = cli/pyproject.toml (sole pyproject in repo).
